results.sql:
WITH director_role AS (
  SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'
),
actor_roles AS (
  SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')
),
movies AS (
  SELECT id FROM title
  WHERE kind_id = 1  -- movies only
    AND production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
),
directors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN director_role dr ON ci.role_id = dr.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
actors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
)
SELECT
  d.director_id,
  a.actor_id,
  nd.name AS director_name,
  na.name AS actor_name,
  COUNT(*) AS film_count
FROM directors d
JOIN actors a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
JOIN name nd ON d.director_id = nd.id
JOIN name na ON a.actor_id = na.id
WHERE d.director_id <> a.actor_id
GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id, nd.name, na.name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

  d.director_id,
  a.actor_id,
  nd.name AS director_name,
  na.name AS actor_name,
  COUNT(*) AS film_count
FROM directors d
JOIN actors a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
JOIN name nd ON d.director_id = nd.id
JOIN name na ON a.actor_id = na.id
WHERE d.director_id <> a.actor_id
GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id, nd.name, na.name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

results.sql:
WITH top_pairs AS (
  SELECT * FROM (VALUES
    (433237, 179356),    -- E.V.V. / Brahmanandam
    (1560859, 864559),   -- Johnnie To / Lam Suet
    (1189526, 1499363),  -- Trey Parker / Matt Stone
    (391018, 816575),    -- Dhawan / Kiran
    (1697339, 2686282)   -- Wong Jing / Yau Chingmy
  ) AS pairs(director_id, actor_id)
),
pair_movies AS (
  SELECT tp.director_id, tp.actor_id, d.movie_id
  FROM top_pairs tp
  JOIN cast_info d ON d.person_id = tp.director_id
  JOIN cast_info a ON a.person_id = tp.actor_id AND a.movie_id = d.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
    AND a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
),
genre_info AS (
  SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres'
)
SELECT
  tp.director_id,
  tp.actor_id,
  nd.name AS director_name,
  na.name AS actor_name,
  mi.info AS genre,
  COUNT(*) AS films_with_genre
FROM top_pairs tp
JOIN pair_movies pm ON pm.director_id = tp.director_id AND pm.actor_id = tp.actor_id
JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = pm.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM genre_info)
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = tp.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = tp.actor_id
GROUP BY tp.director_id, tp.actor_id, nd.name, na.name, mi.info
ORDER BY tp.director_id, films_with_genre DESC;

WITH top_pairs AS (
  SELECT * FROM (VALUES
    (433237, 179356),
    (1560859, 864559),
    (1189526, 1499363),
    (391018, 816575),
    (1697339, 2686282)
  ) AS pairs(director_id, actor_id)
),
pair_movies AS (
  SELECT tp.director_id, tp.actor_id, d.movie_id
  FROM top_pairs tp
  JOIN cast_info d ON d.person_id = tp.director_id
  JOIN cast_info a ON a.person_id = tp.actor_id AND a.movie_id = d.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
    AND a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
)
SELECT
  tp.director_id,
  nd.name AS director_name,
  na.name AS actor_name,
  cn.name AS company,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pm.movie_id) AS films_together
FROM top_pairs tp
JOIN pair_movies pm ON pm.director_id = tp.director_id AND pm.actor_id = tp.actor_id
JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = pm.movie_id AND mc.company_type_id = 1
JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = tp.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = tp.actor_id
GROUP BY tp.director_id, nd.name, na.name, cn.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pm.movie_id) >= 3
ORDER BY tp.director_id, films_together DESC;

  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id

    AND d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
    AND a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director_name,
  na.name AS actor_name,
  k.keyword,
  COUNT(*) AS films_with_keyword
FROM top_pairs tp
JOIN pair_movies pm ON pm.director_id = tp.director_id AND pm.actor_id = tp.actor_id
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = pm.movie_id
JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = tp.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = tp.actor_id
GROUP BY tp.director_id, tp.actor_id, nd.name, na.name, k.keyword
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 4
ORDER BY tp.director_id, films_with_keyword DESC
LIMIT 50;

results.sql:
WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
actor_roles AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress')),
movies AS (SELECT id FROM title WHERE kind_id = 1 AND production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010),
dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN director_role dr ON ci.role_id = dr.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
pair_counts AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count
  FROM dirs d JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  WHERE d.director_id <> a.actor_id
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
),
pair_genres AS (
  SELECT pc.director_id, pc.actor_id, pc.film_count,
         mi.info AS genre,
         COUNT(*) AS genre_films
  FROM pair_counts pc
  JOIN dirs d ON d.director_id = pc.director_id
  JOIN acts a ON a.actor_id = pc.actor_id AND a.movie_id = d.movie_id
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = d.movie_id
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  WHERE pc.film_count BETWEEN 1 AND 30
  GROUP BY pc.director_id, pc.actor_id, pc.film_count, mi.info
),
genre_hhi AS (
  SELECT director_id, actor_id, film_count,
         SUM((genre_films::float / film_count)^2) AS hhi  -- 1=pure, ~0=diverse
  FROM pair_genres
  GROUP BY director_id, actor_id, film_count
),
buckets AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN film_count = 1 THEN '1_oneoff'
         WHEN film_count = 2 THEN '2_twooff'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5_repeat'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10_frequent'
         ELSE '11+_prolific'
    END AS bucket,
    AVG(hhi) AS avg_hhi,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count
  FROM genre_hhi
  GROUP BY bucket
)
SELECT bucket, pair_count, ROUND(avg_hhi::numeric, 3) AS avg_genre_concentration
FROM buckets
ORDER BY bucket;

results.sql:
WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
actor_roles AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress')),
movies AS (SELECT id FROM title WHERE kind_id = 1 AND production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010),
dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN director_role dr ON ci.role_id = dr.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
pair_counts AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count,
         array_agg(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS movie_ids
  FROM dirs d JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  WHERE d.director_id <> a.actor_id
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) BETWEEN 1 AND 20
),
-- For each pair, count how many of their shared films share any production company
pair_company_overlap AS (
  SELECT pc.director_id, pc.actor_id, pc.film_count,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mc1.company_id = mc2.company_id THEN pc2.movie_id END) AS films_same_company,
         COUNT(DISTINCT pc2.movie_id) AS total_pair_films
  FROM pair_counts pc
  -- unnest movie list
  JOIN LATERAL (SELECT unnest(pc.movie_ids) AS movie_id) pc2 ON true
  JOIN movie_companies mc1 ON mc1.movie_id = pc2.movie_id AND mc1.company_type_id = 1
  -- find other films of this pair that share the company
  JOIN movie_companies mc2 ON mc2.company_id = mc1.company_id 
       AND mc2.movie_id = ANY(pc.movie_ids) AND mc2.company_type_id = 1
  WHERE mc1.movie_id <> mc2.movie_id
  GROUP BY pc.director_id, pc.actor_id, pc.film_count
),
bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN film_count = 1 THEN '1_oneoff'
         WHEN film_count = 2 THEN '2_twofilm'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5_repeat'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10_frequent'
         ELSE '11-20_prolific'
    END AS bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    AVG(films_same_company::float / NULLIF(total_pair_films,0)) AS avg_company_overlap_rate
  FROM pair_company_overlap
  GROUP BY bucket
)
SELECT bucket, pair_count, ROUND(avg_company_overlap_rate::numeric, 3) AS avg_shared_company_rate
FROM bucketed
ORDER BY bucket;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
actor_roles AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress')),
movies AS (SELECT id FROM title WHERE kind_id = 1 AND production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010),
dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN director_role dr ON ci.role_id = dr.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
pair_counts AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count,
         array_agg(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS movie_ids
  FROM dirs d JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  WHERE d.director_id <> a.actor_id
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) BETWEEN 1 AND 20
),
-- For each pair, count how many of their shared films share any production company
pair_company_overlap AS (
  SELECT pc.director_id, pc.actor_id, pc.film_count,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mc1.company_id = mc2.company_id THEN pc2.movie_id END) AS films_same_company,
         COUNT(DISTINCT pc2.movie_id) AS total_pair_films
  FROM pair_counts pc
  -- unnest movie list
  JOIN LATERAL (SELECT unnest(pc.movie_ids) AS movie_id) pc2 ON true
  JOIN movie_companies mc1 ON mc1.movie_id = pc2.movie_id AND mc1.company_type_id = 1
  -- find other films of this pair that share the company
  JOIN movie_companies mc2 ON mc2.company_id = mc1.company_id 
       AND mc2.movie_id = ANY(pc.movie_ids) AND mc2.company_type_id = 1
  WHERE mc1.movie_id <> mc2.movie_id
  GROUP BY pc.director_id, pc.actor_id, pc.film_count
),
bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN film_count = 1 THEN '1_oneoff'
         WHEN film_count = 2 THEN '2_twofilm'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5_repeat'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10_frequent'
         ELSE '11-20_prolific'
    END AS bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    AVG(films_same_company::float / NULLIF(total_pair_films,0)) AS avg_company_overlap_rate
  FROM pair_company_overlap
  GROUP BY bucket
)
SELECT bucket, pair_count, ROUND(avg_company_overlap_rate::numeric, 3) AS avg_shared_company_rate
FROM bucketed
ORDER BY bucket;

results.sql:
WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
actor_roles AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress')),
movies AS (SELECT id FROM title WHERE kind_id = 1 AND production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010),
dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN director_role dr ON ci.role_id = dr.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
pair_films AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, d.movie_id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY d.director_id, a.actor_id) AS film_count
  FROM dirs d JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  WHERE d.director_id <> a.actor_id
),
pair_company_counts AS (
  SELECT pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.film_count,
         mc.company_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT pf.movie_id) AS co_films
  FROM pair_films pf
  JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = pf.movie_id AND mc.company_type_id = 1
  WHERE pf.film_count >= 2
  GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.film_count, mc.company_id
),
top_company_per_pair AS (
  SELECT director_id, actor_id, film_count,
         MAX(co_films) AS top_company_films
  FROM pair_company_counts
  GROUP BY director_id, actor_id, film_count
),
bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN film_count = 2 THEN '2_twofilm'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5_repeat'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10_frequent'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '11-20_prolific'
         ELSE '21+_extreme'
    END AS bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    AVG(top_company_films::float / film_count) AS avg_top_company_fraction
  FROM top_company_per_pair
  GROUP BY bucket
)
SELECT bucket, pair_count, ROUND(avg_top_company_fraction::numeric, 3) AS avg_dominant_company_share
FROM bucketed
ORDER BY bucket;

results.sql:
WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
actor_roles AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress')),
movies AS (SELECT id FROM title WHERE kind_id = 1 AND production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010),
dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN director_role dr ON ci.role_id = dr.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
pair_films AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, d.movie_id,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY d.director_id, a.actor_id) AS film_count
  FROM dirs d JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  WHERE d.director_id <> a.actor_id
),
pair_genre_counts AS (
  SELECT pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.film_count,
         mi.info AS genre,
         COUNT(DISTINCT pf.movie_id) AS genre_films
  FROM pair_films pf
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = pf.movie_id
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  WHERE pf.film_count >= 1
  GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.film_count, mi.info
),
top_genre_per_pair AS (
  SELECT director_id, actor_id, film_count,
         MAX(genre_films) AS top_genre_films
  FROM pair_genre_counts
  GROUP BY director_id, actor_id, film_count
),
bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN film_count = 1 THEN '1_oneoff'
         WHEN film_count = 2 THEN '2_twofilm'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5_repeat'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10_frequent'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '11-20_prolific'
         ELSE '21+_extreme'
    END AS bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    AVG(top_genre_films::float / film_count) AS avg_dominant_genre_fraction
  FROM top_genre_per_pair
  GROUP BY bucket
)
SELECT bucket, pair_count, ROUND(avg_dominant_genre_fraction::numeric, 3) AS avg_dominant_genre_share
FROM bucketed
ORDER BY bucket;

results.sql:
WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
actor_roles AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress')),
movies AS (SELECT id FROM title WHERE kind_id = 1 AND production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010),
dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN director_role dr ON ci.role_id = dr.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
pair_counts AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count,
         array_agg(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS movie_ids
  FROM dirs d JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  WHERE d.director_id <> a.actor_id
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
),
pair_country AS (
  SELECT pc.director_id, pc.actor_id, pc.film_count,
         mi.info AS country,
         COUNT(*) AS country_films
  FROM pair_counts pc
  JOIN LATERAL (SELECT unnest(pc.movie_ids) AS movie_id) m ON true
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = m.movie_id
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'countries')
  GROUP BY pc.director_id, pc.actor_id, pc.film_count, mi.info
),
top_country_per_pair AS (
  SELECT director_id, actor_id, film_count,
         country AS dominant_country,
         country_films,
         RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY director_id, actor_id ORDER BY country_films DESC) AS rnk
  FROM pair_country
),
top_pairs_with_country AS (
  SELECT tc.director_id, tc.actor_id, tc.film_count, tc.dominant_country,
         nd.name AS director_name, na.name AS actor_name
  FROM top_country_per_pair tc
  JOIN name nd ON nd.id = tc.director_id
  JOIN name na ON na.id = tc.actor_id
  WHERE tc.rnk = 1
)
SELECT dominant_country, COUNT(*) AS pair_count, ROUND(AVG(film_count),1) AS avg_films
FROM top_pairs_with_country
GROUP BY dominant_country
ORDER BY pair_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

/*+ Rows(ci ci_1 info_type mi na nd role_type role_type_1 #8828856) Rows(ci ci_1 info_type mi nd role_type role_type_1 #8828856) Rows(ci ci_1 mi role_type role_type_1 #8828856) Rows(ci ci_1 role_type role_type_1 #8828856) Rows(ci ci_1 role_type role_type_1 #2436083) Rows(ci_1 role_type_1 #2229373) Rows(ci role_type #259580) */
WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
actor_roles AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress')),
movies AS (SELECT id FROM title WHERE kind_id = 1 AND production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010),
dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN director_role dr ON ci.role_id = dr.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.id
  WHERE ci.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies)
),
pair_counts AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count,
         array_agg(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS movie_ids
  FROM dirs d JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  WHERE d.director_id <> a.actor_id
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
),
pair_country AS (
  SELECT pc.director_id, pc.actor_id, pc.film_count,
         mi.info AS country,
         COUNT(*) AS country_films
  FROM pair_counts pc
  JOIN LATERAL (SELECT unnest(pc.movie_ids) AS movie_id) m ON true
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = m.movie_id
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'countries')
  GROUP BY pc.director_id, pc.actor_id, pc.film_count, mi.info
),
top_country_per_pair AS (
  SELECT director_id, actor_id, film_count,
         country AS dominant_country,
         country_films,
         RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY director_id, actor_id ORDER BY country_films DESC) AS rnk
  FROM pair_country
),
top_pairs_with_country AS (
  SELECT tc.director_id, tc.actor_id, tc.film_count, tc.dominant_country,
         nd.name AS director_name, na.name AS actor_name
  FROM top_country_per_pair tc
  JOIN name nd ON nd.id = tc.director_id
  JOIN name na ON na.id = tc.actor_id
  WHERE tc.rnk = 1
)
SELECT dominant_country, COUNT(*) AS pair_count, ROUND(AVG(film_count),1) AS avg_films
FROM top_pairs_with_country
GROUP BY dominant_country
ORDER BY pair_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
